name: generate-title
description: Generate title or headline candidates for a piece of content.

content.description: The text, summary, or topic to generate titles for.

count.description: Number of title candidates to generate. Default: 3.

maxLength.description: Maximum character count per title. Default: 80.

titles.description: Generated title candidates, ordered from most to least recommended.

errors.message: Input does not conform to the schema.
Model output does not conform to the schema.
